org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gxl

Class GXLException

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Throwable
      • java.lang.Exception
        • java.io.IOException
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gxl.GXLException
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable

    public class GXLException
extends IOException
    Exception dedicated to the GXL format.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    "http://www.gupro.de/GXL/", Serialized Form

    org.arakhne.neteditor
